implemented: Third family evaluation protocol (AUC, recall, FMR, replay, baseline gap)
Synthetic test data generator for reproducible testing
finding: Third family evaluation framework is complete. Yahoo S5 adapter handles the CSV format with anomaly windows. Transfer evaluation produces AUC, recall, FMR, replay pass rate, and baseline gap. T1 support is determined by AUC > 0.9 threshold.
decision: Promote third family evaluation framework. Next: promote or reject third family based on evaluation results, then plan Phase 2 completion.
non_claim_lock: Third family framework is built but evaluation requires real Yahoo S5 data download. No T1 claim until evaluation completes.
